name: RED SQUARE   THE SHOOTER
description: Are you ready for an adrenaline-pumping adventure in a world of danger and excitement? Look no further than this exciting 2D top-down shooter game! With simple graphics and fast paced gameplay, Red Square - The Shooter is the perfect way to get your heart racing and your blood pumping.
instructions: WASD to move Click to shoot Click on the power-up button on the right to use one There are touch controls for mobile
